description: Mode B — Post-Phase-15 architecture-refinement slice. For discoveries surfaced after Phase 15 (new DISCs, new DECs, cleavage carry-forward, per-element model evolution). Sequence: (1) settle design in conversation; (2) persist same turn — DEC entry in `data/seed-round-plan.md` + DISC row in `phases/discoveries.md` + entry in `docs/domain-model.md` if model-touching + LOG event in `ORCHESTRATOR-LOG.md` + STATE refresh in `ORCHESTRATOR-STATE.md` + tracking commit; (3) plan-mode — write plan to `~/.claude/plans/<slug>.md`; (4) ExitPlanMode for user approval; (5) dispatch general-purpose IMPL sub-agent with a fully self-contained directive (per `prompts-as-complete-directives` convention) — the agent STOPs on ambiguity per mandate-008 rather than guessing; (6) orchestrator post-IMPL pass — re-run the gate independently, apply migrations to dev DB via the postgres superuser DSN, verify, refresh tracking docs, tracking commit. Dev DB carries the tenant `chiway-repton-xiamen`; all `manage.py` + `uv` runs from `school-improvement-plans/`. PyRight `.objects`/import errors are documented false positives; mypy is the type gate.
